content:
Hello, DEV community!

I'm excited to start sharing my journey to becoming a full-stack developer. I'm beginner , i have a big dream and i believe in consistency, patience, and hard work.

This is day 1 of journey that will change my life.

MY GOAL;

i'm not just learning code. i'm building my future.

• learn javascript deeply
2.build real projects
3.upload projects on GitHub
4.Become a confident full-stack developer
